violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean both reach in coolers.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Acoustic tiles above the dish machine need to be replaced.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Cut edges of shelving need to be sealed/painted.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Walk in cooler fan cover need to be cleaned.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Does not appear that a licensed plumber installed water lines at the dish machine.

Backflow prevention. — --Plumbing system was not installed to preclude backflow of a solid, liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply system. Drain line into floor sink must have an air gap needs to be installed on the dish machine and on the three copmartment sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles above the dish machine have acoustic tiles and need to be replaced.
Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Hang aprons on the hooks provided; not on shelves.
Clean, proper temperature, cleaning agent (2 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
